name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: At 2301 North Central Drive, Suite A, Bedford, TX 76021, Cash America Pawn can be reached at +1 817-835-0898.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn shop chain globally. Founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers, the company has grown to operate more than 3,300 retail pawn locations across 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company is publicly traded and included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people.

FirstCash's core business model centers on two primary services: making small non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, and buying and selling a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Customers can obtain fast pawn loans by using their personal items as collateral, or purchase items from FirstCash's retail inventory. The company also operates layaway services allowing customers to purchase items with a 10% down payment, gold buying services for customers looking to sell precious metals for immediate cash, and through its subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ retail merchant partners.

What distinguishes FirstCash from smaller pawn operators is its massive scale and geographic reach, enabling consistent operations across multiple countries and regions. The company's integration with technology-driven point-of-sale systems and its subsidiary's lease-to-own offerings create an ecosystem serving underbanked consumers. With over 2,500 store locations and comprehensive inventory management, FirstCash provides significant consumer choice and reliable access to pawn services.

FirstCash serves consumers who need immediate cash without credit checks or income verification, but should understand that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and carry typical interest rates associated with secured lending. The company's scale and public status provide legitimate operations and consistent policies, though customers should carefully evaluate the value of items pledged versus loan amounts received. Best suited for those with valuable items and temporary cash needs who prefer avoiding traditional credit.
address: 2301 North Central Drive, Suite A, Bedford, TX 76021

company_info.headquarters: 2301 North Central Drive, Suite A, Bedford, TX 76021

pros: 3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America providing convenient access
Fast pawn loans with no credit check required, serving credit-constrained consumers
Wide range of merchandise accepted including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Publicly traded company listed on S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indexes providing transparency and legitimacy
Gold and precious metals buying service offering immediate cash for valuable items
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for customers wanting to purchase items
Non-recourse pawn loans mean customers only lose pledged items if loan isn't repaid, without additional debt
cons: Interest rates on pawn loans not disclosed on website; customers must visit store for pricing
Requires surrendering personal property as collateral, creating risk of loss if loan defaults
No mention of loan terms, repayment periods, or renewal options on public-facing website
Limited transparency about redemption timelines and storage policies for pledged items
Pawn loans typically come with higher effective interest rates compared to traditional bank lending
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) needing immediate short-term cash
Credit-constrained or unbanked consumers who cannot access traditional bank loans
People seeking to purchase items affordably through the layaway service with 10% down
Customers looking to sell gold, silver, or platinum for quick cash without broker fees
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash without credit verification, including those seeking gold buyouts or affordable purchases through layaway. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and typically carry higher interest rates than traditional lending; customers should only pledge items they can afford to lose and carefully evaluate loan-to-value ratios before proceeding.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Retail buying and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying with immediate cash payment
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own financing through subsidiary AFF at 15,000+ retail merchant locations
Retail finance payment solutions for consumer goods and services
Store locator and inventory search tools
Merchandise acquisition for items of value
Cash advances on personal property value
Pawn loan renewals and extensions (implied by FAQ section)
